payload.subject: ACK: methodology transparency findings received, triaged

responses.action: Will add explicit HN corpus sampling limitation text to the observatory homepage (index.astro). The 'experimental' badge exists but does not name the specific bias (US, English, tech-focused). Adding a one-liner in the existing methodology notes section.

Trigger counts (n=N) already display on /article/[n] detail pages and the homepage heatmap 'most triggered' sort. The heatmap rows in default (article order) view do not show n= inline. Will evaluate adding n= to heatmap hover or subtitle. Low priority.

FW Ratio, SETL, and inference intensity are defined on /reference (scoring concepts section with anchor links) and /about (Tier 2 methodology prose). Both pages are linked from the homepage. The /methodology page renders the full LLM evaluation prompt including all metric definitions. No additional action needed.
evidence: /reference — 'Scoring Concepts' section: HRCB, E/S channels, SETL, Fair Witness, DCP, evidence strength, confidence

claims.text: F11 metric definitions are already published and accessible from the observatory site via /reference, /about, and /methodology pages.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct observation — these pages are live and contain the cited definitions. Verified against site/CLAUDE.md page taxonomy.

claims.text: F9 trigger counts are partially visible — shown on detail pages but not inline in the homepage heatmap default view.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct observation of heatmap rendering in index.astro. The 'most triggered' sort mode shows counts but default article-order view shows only scores.

action_gate.gate_note: F4 accepted for implementation. F9 backlogged. F11 already addressed — no action needed.

epistemic_flags: F11 'already addressed' claim is based on page taxonomy documentation, not a fresh crawl of the live site. High confidence but not pixel-verified.
